use_cases: Dashboard quick navigation for navigating between sections
Landing page link collection for feature discovery
Footer navigation links for site-wide access
Mobile-friendly navigation menu for small screens
Admin panel sidebar links for internal tools
ai_summary: A vibrant purple navigation card component with animated spinning cross decorations and hover-enabled link items. Built with Next.js Link for client-side navigation, featuring a composite structure with wrapper, heading, and link sub-components. The card uses Tailwind CSS for styling with glass-morphism-like transparency effects.
